job.description: Install 3 new double sockets in living room (chimney breast wall), replace bathroom extractor fan with new humidity-sensing model venting via existing roof tile vent, add 1 outdoor PIR security light at rear door. Customer providing the PIR fixture.
job.site_visit_notes: 1960s semi-detached. Living room is lath-and-plaster, will need chasing. Bathroom loft access available. Existing CU is 18th edition, recent install. No earth issues. Customer wants quoted within 2 weeks; available weekends preferred. Customer has a son working from home in the spare room, so noise during weekday daytime is fine.
